overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking along a waterfront promenade at night. The scene begins with a view of the Statue of Liberty across the water, then transitions to a tree-lined path with city buildings visible through the canopy. The atmosphere is calm with warm street lamp illumination and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with view of Statue of Liberty

events.description: character steps from grassy area onto paved stone promenade
character stops at railing to view Statue of Liberty across the water
character turns right and begins walking along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks from grass onto the promenade, pauses to look at the Statue of Liberty in the distance, then turns to walk along the waterfront path

notable_agents.action: man standing near railing looking at his phone
woman standing near railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: grassy area with fallen leaves where character starts
hexagonal stone paved walkway along the water
black metal railing separating walkway from the water
illuminated Statue of Liberty visible across the water holding torch
ornate black cast iron street lamp with warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Spider-Man standing on a grassy area beside a waterfront promenade at night. He walks onto the paved stone path, approaches the railing to view the illuminated Statue of Liberty across the water, then turns to walk along the promenade. Vintage street lamps provide warm lighting, and a few pedestrians stand near the railing enjoying the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined waterfront promenade with city skyline backdrop

events.description: pedestrian density increases as character passes groups of people on benches
pedestrian in dark jacket passes close to camera temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks steadily along the promenade passing various pedestrians, some walking toward him and others sitting on park benches

notable_agents.action: man in business suit walking toward camera along the path
woman in gray coat walking along the railing in same direction

entered.detail: tall deciduous trees with sparse autumn foliage lining the left side
tall illuminated skyscrapers visible through gaps in the tree canopy
wooden slatted park bench with people sitting

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues walking along the tree-lined waterfront promenade, moving away from the open water view into a more enclosed path with city buildings visible through the trees. The camera follows steadily from behind as he passes pedestrians walking in both directions and people sitting on benches. Vintage street lamps continue to line the path, casting pools of warm light on the hexagonal paving stones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime waterfront promenade that shifts from an open vista of the harbor to a sheltered, tree-lined urban path. It begins with Spider-Man stepping from a grassy area onto a paved stone walkway, where he pauses at the railing to look across the water at the illuminated Statue of Liberty. As he turns to walk away from the harbor, the open view of the water gradually recedes, and the environment becomes more enclosed by a canopy of trees. The scene then transitions into a steady follow-shot as he passes pedestrians and people on benches, with city buildings appearing through the foliage. Finally, the camera tracks his progress along the hexagonal paving stones, guided by the consistent glow of vintage street lamps casting warm pools of light.
